name: chain_source_viral_us_products_from_aliexpress
method: source viral us products from aliexpress. list on nordic platforms in local language. klarna/vipps/swish payments. ioss for eu vat. phase 1: dropship. phase 2: eu warehouse. nordic ecom arbitrage: us

stages.task: scrape trending US products from AliExpress (sorted by orders, 4+ stars, ePacket/free shipping), Amazon Movers & Shakers, viral TikTok products
search each trending product on finn.no, cdon.se, dba.dk, tori.fi — flag products with <3 competing listings AND >30% margin after shipping+VAT
translate product title+description to local language using Claude, generate platform-specific listing format, calculate IOSS-compliant pricing with Klarna/Vipps markup
daily check competitor pricing on Nordic platforms, alert if margin drops below 20%, suggest repricing
